# Rooted Legacy

> Marketing + commerce + community platform for an Indianapolis urban farm. Booking (RSVP), produce farm stand (read-only), recipes, history, weather, vendor + contact forms, admin dashboard.

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 15 (App Router) ¬∑ TypeScript ¬∑ Tailwind CSS v4 ¬∑ Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage) ¬∑ Resend ¬∑ Google Sheets API ¬∑ OpenWeather ¬∑ MDX (next-mdx-remote) ¬∑ Vercel hosting
**Status:** Phase 1 MVP shipped on `perry-v2` branch; awaiting external-service provisioning + merge to `main`
**Purpose:** Public-facing site + lightweight backoffice for the farm and its partners (Bodi Buzz, Cre8tive Alignment Network, Pure-trition). Single developer maintains.

## Core Documentation

- `README.md` ‚Äî Setup and getting started
- `docs/SETUP.md` ‚Äî Provisioning Supabase, Resend, Google Sheets (do this first)
- `CODE_MAP.md` ‚Äî Feature-to-file map
- `ENTRY_POINTS.md` ‚Äî npm scripts, routes, middleware, server actions
- `DATA_FLOW.md` ‚Äî System-level data movement (auth, RSVP, produce, etc.)
- `IMPORT_GRAPH_SUMMARY.md` ‚Äî Core modules + server/client boundaries + refactor-risk areas
- `FEATURE_BOUNDARIES.md` ‚Äî Component responsibilities and isolation
- `docs/ai/memory.md` ‚Äî Project history and current state
- `docs/ai/roadmap.md` ‚Äî Phase 1 / Phase 2 / Phase 3 plan
- `docs/ai/tasks.md` ‚Äî Active work
- `docs/ai/decisions.md` ‚Äî 10 ADRs (stack, content strategy, weather provider, branching, Supabase, four-client model, hand-written types, Sheets-as-inventory, read-only admin)
- `docs/ai/architecture.md` ‚Äî System design

## Key Files by Area

### Layout / Brand
- `app/layout.tsx`
- `components/layout/Header.tsx` ‚Äî client component; mobile menu + primary-nav desktop slice
- `components/layout/Footer.tsx` ‚Äî secondary nav + newsletter signup
- `components/brand/Logo.tsx`
- `app/globals.css` ‚Äî Tailwind v4 `@theme` + brand tokens
- `content/site.ts` ‚Äî name, tagline, address, partners, nav (with `primary` flag)

### Supabase + Auth
- `lib/supabase/server.ts` ‚Äî RSC + route handlers (cookies)
- `lib/supabase/browser.ts` ‚Äî client components
- `lib/supabase/admin.ts` ‚Äî service-role (server-only)
- `lib/supabase/public.ts` ‚Äî anon, cookie-less (safe at build)
- `lib/supabase/types.ts` ‚Äî hand-written Database type
- `lib/auth.ts` ‚Äî getCurrentUser / getCurrentRole / requireAdmin
- `middleware.ts` ‚Äî session refresh + /admin and /account gating
- `supabase/migrations/0001_init.sql` + `supabase/seed.sql`

### Events + RSVP
- `app/events/page.tsx`, `app/events/[slug]/page.tsx`, `app/events/[slug]/actions.ts`
- `components/events/{EventCard,BookingForm}.tsx`
- `lib/events.ts`, `lib/validations/booking.ts`

### Produce (Google Sheets)
- `lib/sheets.ts` ‚Äî JWT auth + 15-min cache + ProduceItem normalization
- `app/shop/page.tsx`, `app/shop/[sku]/page.tsx`
- `components/produce/{ShopCard,WhatsGrowing}.tsx`

### Recipes
- `app/recipes/page.tsx`, `app/recipes/[slug]/page.tsx`
- `lib/recipes.ts`
- `content/recipes/*.mdx`

### History
- `app/history/page.tsx`, `app/history/[slug]/page.tsx`
- `lib/mdx.ts`
- `content/history/*.mdx`

### Forms (Newsletter / Vendor / Contact)
- `components/marketing/NewsletterSignup.tsx`
- `app/actions/newsletter.ts`, `app/api/newsletter/confirm/route.ts`
- `app/vendors/apply/*`, `app/contact/*`
- `lib/validations/*`
- `components/forms/fields.tsx` ‚Äî shared Input/Textarea/SubmitButton/FormAlert

### Gallery
- `app/gallery/page.tsx`
- `lib/gallery.ts` ‚Äî local `/public` or Supabase Storage path resolution

### Admin
- `app/admin/layout.tsx` ‚Äî role gate
- `app/admin/page.tsx` ‚Äî dashboard counts
- `app/admin/{bookings,subscribers,vendors,messages}/page.tsx`
- `components/admin/DataTable.tsx`

### Weather (v1)
- `lib/weather.ts`
- `app/weather/page.tsx`
- `components/weather/WeatherWidget.tsx`

### Email
- `lib/resend.ts` ‚Äî wrapHtml + sendEmail; soft no-op when RESEND_API_KEY missing

## Common Tasks

**To add a history article:** create `content/history/your-slug.mdx` with `title`, `date`, `excerpt`, optional `author`. Auto-appears at `/history` and `/history/your-slug`.

**To add a recipe:** create `content/recipes/your-slug.mdx` with `title`, `season`, `ingredients` (array), `prep_time`, `cook_time`, `yield`. Shop items whose name matches any `ingredients` entry will cross-link to it.

**To add an event:** insert into the Supabase `events` table (Studio or SQL). Set `status='published'` to make it visible. `kind='free_rsvp'` enables the RSVP form; `kind='external'` shows a partner link; `kind='ticketed'` is a Phase 2 stub.

**To grow the produce catalog:** edit the Google Sheet ‚Äî that's it. Site picks up changes within 15 minutes (or hit a "refresh now" button in admin once Phase 2 adds it).

**To change brand tokens:** edit `:root` and `@theme inline` blocks in `app/globals.css`. Token names are referenced as Tailwind utilities repo-wide (`bg-bg-elev`, `text-cream`, etc.) ‚Äî rename via project-wide find/replace.

**To grant admin to a user:** add their email to `ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST` (`.env.local` + Vercel). Role is conferred on next sign-in.

**To run locally:** `npm install`, copy `.env.example` to `.env.local`, fill the keys you have, then `npm run dev` (http://localhost:3000). Missing keys produce graceful "Not configured" fallbacks.

**To deploy:** merge `perry-v2 ‚Üí main`. Vercel auto-deploys. Env vars must be set in the Vercel project (mirror of `.env.local`).

## Environment Variables

### Required for MVP
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` ‚Äî project URL (no trailing path)
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` ‚Äî `sb_publishable_*` or legacy anon key
- `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` ‚Äî `sb_secret_*` or legacy service_role key (server-only)
- `ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST` ‚Äî comma-separated admin emails
- `OPENWEATHER_API_KEY` ‚Äî weather widget

### Optional (feature degrades gracefully if missing)
- `RESEND_API_KEY` ‚Äî without it, all transactional + newsletter emails silently no-op
- `RESEND_FROM` ‚Äî override default sender
- `CONTACT_TO_EMAIL` ‚Äî admin notification recipient
- `GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID`, `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON` ‚Äî without them, `/shop` shows "Not configured" notice and WhatsGrowing widget hides

### Optional overrides
- `WEATHER_LAT`, `WEATHER_LON`, `WEATHER_UNITS` ‚Äî defaults to farm coords + imperial

### Phase 2 (uncomment when ready)
- `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY`, `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`

`.env.local` is gitignored. `.env.example` is committed and documents everything.

## Git Workflow

- `main` ‚Äî production; Vercel auto-deploys
- `perry-v2` ‚Äî sole working branch; PR into `main` when ready
- All historical `feat/*` and `develop` branches deleted to keep the model simple
